## Riley Park — ICP Assessment

**Short answer: No match. Do not pursue.**

---

### Scoring Against Each ICP Criterion

| Criterion | Requirement | Riley Park | Match? |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Stage** | Series A–C | Freelancer / sole trader | ❌ |
| **Headcount** | 20–250 | 1 (themselves) | ❌ |
| **ARR** | $2M–$50M | Freelance income, nowhere near | ❌ |
| **Product shape** | B2B SaaS with AI feature | Brand design services | ❌ |
| **Role** | VP Product, Head of AI/ML, Dir. Eng, Founder/CTO | Freelance designer | ❌ |

---

### Summary

Riley is a **freelance brand designer** serving small businesses. There is **no overlap** with the ICP on any dimension — wrong company type, wrong scale, wrong role, and no SaaS or AI context whatsoever.

**Recommendation: Remove from pipeline.** No outreach hook is warranted here.
